zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Emeline Spynge於1481年出生在英國薩默塞特蒙塔庫特時，她的父親William Spinge21歲，母親Easter Spinge21歲。她於大約1499年與Sir Richard Walter Phillips在英國薩默塞特蒙塔庫特結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1557年在她的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Emeline Spynge于1481年出生在英国薩默塞特蒙塔庫特时，她的父亲William Spinge21岁，母亲Easter Spinge21岁。她于大约1499年与Sir Richard Walter Phillips在英国薩默塞特蒙塔庫特结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1557年在她的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Spynge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Spong
meanings: English (Surrey and Middlesex): from Middle English spong ‘narrow strip of land or ground’ (compare Spann ). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on or by a narrow strip of land, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Spong Hill in North Elmham (Norfolk), Spong Carr in Cantley and Limpenhoe (Norfolk), and Spong Farm in Elmsted (Kent).
Swedish: variant of Spång (see Spang 2) and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. This surname is rare in Sweden.

variants.name: Emily
meanings: From a medieval form of the Latin name Aemilia, the feminine version of the old Roman family name Aemilius (probably from aemulus ‘rival’). It was not common in the Middle Ages, but was revived in the 19th century and is extremely popular throughout the English-speaking world today. Its best-known 19th‐century bearer was probably the novelist and poet Emily Brontë ( 1818–48 ).

variants.name: Emma
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

variants.name: Emmeline
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Emeline Spynge was born in 1481, in Montacute, Somerset, England, her father, William Spinge, was 21 and her mother, Easter Spinge, was 21. She married Sir Richard Walter Phillips about 1499, in Montacute, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1557, in her hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Emeline Spynge est née en 1481, à Montacute, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, William Spinge, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Easter Spinge, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Walter Phillips environ 1499, à Montacute, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1557, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Emeline Spynge 1481 in Montacute, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Spinge 21 und ihre Mutter Easter Spinge 21. Sie hat um 1499 in Montacute, Somerset, England Sir Richard Walter Phillips geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1557 im Alter von 76 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

Lei sposato Sir Richard Walter Phillips circa 1499, nel Montacute, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1557, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Emeline Spyngeが1481年にイギリスソメルセトモンタクウトで生まれた時，父William Spingeは21歳，母Easter Spingeは21歳であった。約1499年にイギリスソメルセトモンタクウトでSir Richard Walter Phillipsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1557年に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Emeline Spynge(이)가 1481년 영국 서머세트 몽악트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Spinge(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Easter Spinge(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1499년 영국 서머세트 몽악트에서 Sir Richard Walter Phillips(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1557년 그녀의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emeline Spynge nasceu em 1481, em Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Spinge, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Easter Spinge, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Walter Phillips aproximadamente 1499, em Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1557, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Emeline Spynge родилась в 1481 г. в местности монтакут, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени William Spinge было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Easter Spinge, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Walter Phillips около 1499 г. в местности монтакут, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1557 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Emeline Spynge nació en 1481, en Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, William Spinge, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Easter Spinge, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Walter Phillips aproximadamente 1499, en Montacute, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1557, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
